description: Blueprint for implementing Agent Harness and Harness Engineering features into the AI-DB-QC pipeline, focusing on observability, circuit breaking, adaptive contracts, and semantic coverage.
technology_stack: tenacity (for retry and circuit breaking mechanisms)

WBS_1_0.name: Implement LangGraph Event Tracing
WBS_1_0.description: Intercept state transitions in LangGraph execution and log structured JSONL traces including node execution time, token usage, and state deltas.
acceptance_criteria: Every node execution produces a structured log entry.
Logs are saved to a dedicated telemetry sink (.jsonl format).
Trace ID is consistently propagated across a single run.

WBS_2_0.name: Implement Consecutive Failure Tracking & Circuit Breaker
WBS_2_0.description: Add consecutive failure counters to WorkflowState. Modify graph routing logic to trigger a circuit breaker and route to a recovery node if failures exceed a threshold.
acceptance_criteria: WorkflowState correctly tracks consecutive L1/L2 failures.
System gracefully halts or enters recovery mode when the threshold (e.g., 3 consecutive failures) is met.
Circuit breaker events are recorded in the telemetry logs.

WBS_3_0.name: Implement Runtime Contract Hot-Patching
WBS_3_0.description: Enhance Agent 3 to catch undocumented DB errors during execution. Feed these errors back to dynamically update the L1 API contract in WorkflowState for subsequent iterations.
acceptance_criteria: Agent 3 successfully catches execution errors from DB adapters.
Errors are parsed and new rules are appended to WorkflowState.contracts.l1_api.
Subsequent test cases generated by Agent 2 respect the newly discovered rules.

WBS_4_0.name: Implement Vector Similarity Monitoring and Mutation Prompting
WBS_4_0.description: Add a mechanism to calculate cosine similarity between newly generated vectors and historical vectors. Inject forced mutation prompts into WorkflowState if mode collapse is detected.
acceptance_criteria: System calculates semantic similarity for generated test cases.
Forced mutation prompts are successfully injected into Agent 2's context when similarity exceeds a threshold.
Diversity of generated test cases improves after mutation prompts are applied.

milestones.name: Observability & State Management Baseline
milestones.quality_gate: 100% of pipeline executions are logged in JSONL format with valid Trace IDs. Circuit breaker successfully triggers upon 3 simulated failures.

milestones.name: Intelligent Harness Loop
milestones.quality_gate: System can successfully discover and integrate at least one undocumented DB constraint during runtime. Semantic coverage monitor successfully injects mutation prompts when mode collapse is simulated.
